description: Zoom Server-to-Server OAuth, legacy JWT app credentials (deprecated June 2023), Webhook verification, meeting-control red flags. Includes Zoom Phone where overlap.

token_patterns.name: Zoom Legacy JWT App Token (deprecated June 2023)
token_patterns.notes: JWT apps were deprecated 1 Jun 2023 — presence in new code is a debt + secret-leak signal.

token_patterns.name: Zoom Meeting Join URL with embedded password (pwd=)

misconfigurations.title: Webhook endpoint does not validate `x-zm-signature` (and CRC token handshake)
misconfigurations.rationale: Lets attackers spoof participant_left / phone_call events to game integrations.
misconfigurations.fix: Compute HMAC-SHA256 with the Verification Token over `v0:<x-zm-request-timestamp>:<body>`; compare against `x-zm-signature` (v0=...). Handle the validation event with the `encryptedToken` HMAC handshake.

misconfigurations.title: Cloud recording sharing set to 'Publicly available'
misconfigurations.rationale: Multiple public Zoom recording leaks have surfaced via this default.
misconfigurations.fix: Account settings > Recording > Sharing & passcode — require passcode, require login, set link expiration ≤ 7 days.

misconfigurations.title: Waiting Room disabled for external meetings
misconfigurations.rationale: Disabled Waiting Room leads to Zoombombing / uninvited-guest exposure.
misconfigurations.fix: Account settings > Meeting > require Waiting Room for guests / non-authenticated users.

misconfigurations.title: Default meeting passcode enforcement turned off
misconfigurations.rationale: Brute force / leaked link reuse becomes trivial.
misconfigurations.fix: Account settings > Security > require passcode for instant, scheduled, PMI, and webinars.

misconfigurations.title: MFA / SSO not enforced; password-only login allowed for admins
misconfigurations.fix: Account settings > Security > require 2FA, require SSO for admins.

admin_red_flags.title: Bulk cloud-recording download by an unusual account
admin_red_flags.rationale: Recordings often contain confidential meeting content / customer PII.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Cloud Recording downloaded` count per user > 10 in 1h.

admin_red_flags.title: User role elevated to Owner / Admin
admin_red_flags.signal: Operation log: role-change to Admin/Owner outside scheduled changes.

admin_red_flags.title: Data Center region added to data routing (especially CN-region routing)
admin_red_flags.rationale: 2020 incident showed data could route through regions outside tenant expectation.
admin_red_flags.signal: Operation log: 'Edit communication content storage location' / 'Customize data center regions'.

admin_red_flags.title: New Marketplace app installed with `meeting:read` / `recording:read` admin scopes
admin_red_flags.signal: Operation log: 'App installed' with admin-scope set.
